devnotes.summary: Actual N uptake rate averaged over the day.
Maximum N uptake rate averaged over the day.
Sum of apparent mass flow transport to roots [kg N/ha/d].
Water influx per unit root length [cm3/cm/d].
Nitrate influx per unit root length.
Nitrate influx per unit effective root length.
Average N uptake rate per day for plotting as a state variable.
Average N uptake rate per day in units of g/m2/d.
Total sum of plant nitrogen demand.
Minimum nitrate concentration subtracted from the actual concentration [kg/cm water].
Plant unavailable share of nitrate [kg N/10 cm].
Maximum value for N uptake per unit root length [kg/cm/d].

procedure.name: CalcRates
procedure.devnotes: Sum of maximum N uptake rate in the internal time step
